top_signals.title: Troilus drills shallow gold, boosts Quebec satellite case
top_signals.summary: The West Rim zone, discovered in 2024 west of the North Reserve Pit, remains outside the current resource.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Glencore to resume emissions spending at Quebec smelter
top_signals.summary: Glencore’s announcement marks a reversal from February, when the company suspended nearly $300 million in planned environmental investments.

top_signals.title: Energy Fuels expects to hit 2026 uranium guidance by midyear
top_signals.summary: Company forecasts uranium production to reach 1.6 million lb. by the end of June, within its full-year guidance range of 1.5-2.5 million lb.
